# Project Summary Report

**Report Date:** 2026-07-03 · **Report Type:** Project Summary Discovery · **Generated By:** project-summary command (full rebuild mode)

## Investigation Scope

This report documents the investigative process used to create the project summary at `docs/PROJECT-SUMMARY.md`.

## Previous Summary Status

- **Status:** No previous summary found.
- **Implication:** This is the first comprehensive project summary for this codebase. Mode auto-selected: **full rebuild**.

## Discovery Process

Foundation files were read directly by the orchestrator; five bounded explorer subagents were dispatched in parallel for the docs/code scans.

### Project Foundation Analysis

**Files Examined:**

- `README.md` (root) — pitch as a portable "team-OS" plugin; stigmergy thesis ("the name is the thesis"); lineage from `dream-flute`; dependencies (spellbook, Bun, tmux, `claude` CLI). **Note:** its design-doc link points at `docs/specs/...`, but the doc actually lives at `docs/architecture/2026-06-28-...` — a stale path.
- `package.json` — `name: anthill`, `version: 1.1.0`, `type: module`, Bun runtime, Biome + Prettier(md-only) + Husky/lint-staged, Citty CLI dep. Scripts: `check` (typecheck + biome + test), `test`, `anthill` (the CLI).
- `AGENTS.md` / `CLAUDE.md` — CLAUDE.md defers to AGENTS.md as single source; AGENTS.md is a lean index (branch flow, Bun runtime, self-hosting note).
- `docs/PROJECT_MANIFESTO.md` — **unfilled template** (placeholders only).

**Tech Stack Discovered:** TypeScript on Bun; Citty for the CLI; Biome (lint/format for code) + Prettier (markdown only, `docs/` excluded); Husky + lint-staged pre-commit; release-please + GitHub Actions CI (main + develop); tmux + spellbook (grapevine/bounty) as the coordination substrate. Distribution is a Claude Code plugin (`.claude-plugin/`).

### Documentation State

**Architecture Docs (`docs/architecture/`):** 3 files — README (meta-guide), TEMPLATE, and the one substantive doc: `2026-06-28-anthill-portable-team-os-design.md` (the design-of-record: D1–D9 locked decisions, config schema, brain/hands split, three-homes-for-knowledge, lifecycle).

**Specifications & Interaction-design:** Both effectively empty — README + unfilled templates only. No authored domain specs or user-flow docs yet.

**Briefs:** One real brief — `2026-06-30-anthill-v0.2-next-release.md` (Active) — the 6-feature v0.2 roadmap.

**Active vs Archived:**
- Projects: 2 active (`anthill-footprint-migration` — Draft, has plan.md; `team-dev-planning` — Draft, proposal + origin-methodology writeup, no plan.md yet), 1 archived (`slice-1-walking-skeleton`). Neither active project has a `sessions/` folder.
- Investigations: 4 active (docs-taxonomy-in-the-team-era, agent-codebase-navigation, agentic-teams-memory-stigmergy-landscape, file-activity-heatmap).

**Key Docs Read:** the design-of-record, the v0.2 brief, `docs/ROADMAP.md`, and the two active proposals.

### Recent Activity Analysis

**Git Analysis (last 30 days):** This month *is* the project's bootstrap. Three arcs: (1) Slice-1 walking skeleton (T1–T10 — CLI shell, manifests, config, tmux + spellbook facade, deterministic scaffold renderer, lifecycle skills); (2) footprint migration v1→v2 (`.anthill/` consolidation, pure migration planner, `anthill migrate` CLI, `anthill:upgrade` skill); (3) tooling/docs hardening (Biome/Husky, release-please + CI, self-host dogfood, a burst of investigations/reports, and the new ROADMAP).

**Most-touched areas:** `skills/` lifecycle docs (bootstrap most-touched), `scripts/anthill/` core (cli, commands, paths, config, migrate, coord), and `templates/docs-team/`.

**Session/Memory Notes:** `docs/memories/` holds only README + TEMPLATE (no memory files written). Only session note is archived (`_archive/slice-1-walking-skeleton/sessions/2026-06-29-slice-1-build.md`).

### Code Structure Inspection

**Entry Point:** `scripts/anthill/cli.ts` (Citty root command `anthill`, with a `help --json` manifest interceptor for agent discovery).

**Commands (`scripts/anthill/commands/`):** team-init, team-convene, team-join, team-spawn, team-attach, team-status, team-support, team-commit, team-down, team-migrate, info(+show/env).

**Support modules:** coord (spellbook facade), tmux, config (`.anthill/config.json` + root marker), migrate (pure planner), paths, manifest (agent-discovery JSON), agent-layer (dual-audience emit), runtime, env-file, help-renderer, styles.

**Skills (`skills/`):** bootstrap, convene, join, finalize-session, upgrade.

**Templates:** `archetypes/layered-app.json`; `docs-team/` living-doc scaffold (README, paper-cuts, `dev/{README,seams,{{handle}}}`).

**Test coverage:** support (config, coord, migrate, tmux) + commands (team-init, team-migrate, team-spawn, team-attach, team-commit, team-down, team-support). Untested: team-convene, team-join, team-status, info*, and manifest/paths/agent-layer/env-file.

## Key Findings

### What This Project Actually Is

anthill is a **Claude Code plugin that installs a multi-agent development team into any repo** — durable *seats* (lead / engine / spine / surface / verify) filled by *ephemeral* agents that coordinate over spellbook's grapevine (chat) + bounty (task board) and leave living docs behind as stigmergic "pheromone trails." It was extracted and generalized from the team system grown in the `dream-flute` project, and it now **dogfoods itself**: this repo carries its own team in `.anthill/`. The code half is a Bun/TypeScript Citty CLI that deterministically renders/migrates the `.anthill/` footprint (the "hands"); the skills half is the lifecycle brain (bootstrap → convene → work → finalize, plus upgrade).

### Current State Assessment

- **Maturity:** Active early development. v0.1 (Slice-1 walking skeleton) landed; on `develop` building toward v0.2. Version `1.1.0` per release-please.
- **Documentation:** Well-documented at the design/process layer (rich `docs/` taxonomy, a design-of-record, an active roadmap); **specifications/interaction-design/memories are still empty scaffolds**, and the manifesto is an unfilled template.
- **Activity:** High — the whole repo is ~5 weeks old.
- **Direction:** Clear and explicitly ordered by `docs/ROADMAP.md`.

### Current Direction

- **Now:** (1) `anthill:plan` — the skeleton→ratify planning skill (the "lifecycle keystone"); (2) the global `anthill` CLI (last unshipped v0.2 foundation piece).
- **Next:** multi-surface archetype + candidate seatings; then the **first instrumented dogfood session** (trace one decision vine→card→doc→code) to generate the empirical trail data that later memory upgrades are gated on.
- **Tension surfaced by the 2026-07-02 fresh-eyes review:** *mechanism is outrunning usage* — the team's own `seams.md` and seat docs are empty scaffolds, so the roadmap deliberately sequences a real dogfood session before layering on more memory machinery.

## Recommendations

- [ ] Fix the stale design-doc link in root `README.md` (`docs/specs/...` → `docs/architecture/2026-06-28-...`).
- [ ] Fill in `docs/PROJECT_MANIFESTO.md` (currently an unfilled template) — the vision content exists in the README and design-of-record.
- [ ] Update README `## Status` (still says "Building Slice 1") to reflect that Slice-1 landed and work is on v0.2.
- [ ] Consider adding tests for the untested lifecycle commands (team-convene, team-join, team-status) as they stabilize.
